case_title: SUNG W. KIM VS. GILBANE BUILDING COMPANY, A RHODE ISLAND et al

docket_entries.description: REPLY TO OPPOSITION TO MO FOR AN ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS (CCP 2033(K); FOR AN ORDER TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (CCP 2030(K); FOR AN ORDER TO COMPEL A RESPONSE TO REQ FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCS; FOR AN ORDER TO COMPEL THE PRODUCTION OF DOCS (CCP 2031(L)(N); AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS (CCP 2033(K), 2030(K), 2031(L) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, SUNG W. AN INDIVIDUAL DOING BUSINESS AS ABLE PAINTING & CONSTRUCTION CO.

DISCOVERY 612, APPEARANCES: CHARLES J. PHILIPPS, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY, SUNG KIM. KEVIN WHITTAKER, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY. HEARING HELD. RULING OF COURT: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR AN ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS, FOR AN ORDER TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, FOR AN ORDER TO COMPEL A RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS --- RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. THE LATE RESPONSES WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1, 011.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
